title: PM Schema V2 UI PM Approval Queue Prototype Design
objective: Define the bounded PM approval-queue prototype surface for Class C review and approval decisions using the governed mutation-authority model without implementing runtime code, reopening PM schema design, broadening into billing finalization, or bypassing the governed mutation seam.
active_role: PM UI Approval Queue Prototype Designer
constrained_outputs: One planning handoff note for the bounded PM approval queue prototype
One route and screen contract covering queue, review detail, decision history, and escalation visibility
One mutation-class summary for Class C review actions showing what remains server-authoritative and never finalizes offline
Prototype acceptance criteria and explicit non-goals with no runtime implementation
validation_steps: Confirm packet UI-003 remains bounded to PM approval-queue prototype design and does not implement runtime code, routes, or component code
Confirm the packet preserves Class C server-authoritative handling and does not allow offline-finalized approval actions
Confirm the packet does not broaden into billing or revenue finalization workflow design beyond visibility and dependency boundaries
Confirm the packet does not ratify the final UI stack beyond the currently approved-for-prototype directional tools
sql_permission_note: Planning only. Packet UI-003 does not authorize PM schema changes, runtime implementation, direct client mutation paths, offline-finalized approval actions, or billing finalization design beyond bounded queue visibility rules.
